title: Minimum Cost to Reach Destination in Time
titleCn: 规定时间内到达终点的最小花费

testcases.input: maxTime = 30, edges = [[0,1,10],[1,2,10],[2,5,10],[0,3,1],[3,4,10],[4,5,15]], passingFees = [5,1,2,20,20,3] Output: 11 Explanation: The path to take is 0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 5, which takes 30 minutes and has $11 worth of passing fees.
testcases.expectedOutput: 11 Explanation: The path to take is 0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 5, which takes 30 minutes and has $11 worth of passing fees.

testcases.input: maxTime = 29, edges = [[0,1,10],[1,2,10],[2,5,10],[0,3,1],[3,4,10],[4,5,15]], passingFees = [5,1,2,20,20,3] Output: 48 Explanation: The path to take is 0 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, which takes 26 minutes and has $48 worth of passing fees. You cannot take path 0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 5 since it would take too long.
testcases.expectedOutput: 48 Explanation: The path to take is 0 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, which takes 26 minutes and has $48 worth of passing fees. You cannot take path 0 -> 1 -> 2 -> 5 since it would take too long.

testcases.input: maxTime = 25, edges = [[0,1,10],[1,2,10],[2,5,10],[0,3,1],[3,4,10],[4,5,15]], passingFees = [5,1,2,20,20,3] Output: -1 Explanation: There is no way to reach city 5 from city 0 within 25 minutes.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no way to reach city 5 from city 0 within 25 minutes.
